meta.title: MyWorkMate — AI-Powered Business Automation
meta.description: Connect intelligent AI agents to Microsoft Dynamics 365 Business Central, OneDrive, and SharePoint. Automate operations, gain insights, and transform how your team works.
meta.ogTitle: MyWorkMate — Your AI Business Command Center
meta.ogDescription: Multi-agent AI platform that connects to your Microsoft ecosystem. Automate ERP queries, analyze documents, visualize data — all through natural conversation.
meta.keywords: AI business assistant, Business Central AI, Dynamics 365 automation, Microsoft AI agent, ERP automation, knowledge base AI, multi-agent orchestration

hero.title: Your AI Companion for Dynamics 365 Business Central
hero.subtitle: Optimize your business processes with intelligent AI agents connected directly to Business Central. Document analysis, data visualization, and web research complement your ERP — all through natural conversation.

features.title: Everything Your Business Needs, One Conversation Away
features.subtitle: From Dynamics 365 Business Central operations to document analysis, data visualization to web research — MyWorkMate brings the power of specialized AI agents to your daily workflows.

erp.title: ERP Intelligence
erp.description: Query customers, vendors, invoices, sales orders, and inventory directly from Business Central. Create and modify records through natural language.

knowledge.title: Knowledge Base
knowledge.description: Upload documents and let AI understand them. Semantic search finds answers across your entire document library — PDFs, spreadsheets, presentations.

orchestration.title: Smart Orchestration
orchestration.description: Ask anything. The Orchestrator automatically routes your question to the right specialist agent, combining their capabilities when needed.

visualization.title: Data Visualization
visualization.description: Transform raw data into clear insights. Bar charts, line graphs, KPI dashboards, combo charts — generated from your data in seconds.

research.title: Research & Analysis
research.description: Real-time web search, data analysis with Python execution, and document generation. Your personal research assistant for complex questions.

files.title: Cloud File Sync
files.description: Connect OneDrive and SharePoint libraries. Your cloud documents become instantly searchable and available to AI agents.

agents.title: Specialized Agents That Work Together
agents.subtitle: Each agent is an expert in its domain. The Orchestrator coordinates them seamlessly, so you just ask — and the right expert answers.

supervisor.name: Orchestrator
supervisor.description: Analyzes your question and automatically selects the best specialist. Combines multiple agents when complex tasks require it.

bcAgent.name: Business Central Expert
bcAgent.description: Direct access to Dynamics 365 Business Central. Query financial data, manage inventory, process sales orders — all through conversation.

ragAgent.name: Knowledge Base Expert
ragAgent.description: Searches your uploaded documents using semantic understanding. Finds precise answers across thousands of pages instantly.

graphingAgent.name: Data Visualization Expert
graphingAgent.description: Transforms numbers into visual stories. From simple bar charts to complex KPI dashboards — all generated from your data.

researchAgent.name: Research & Analysis
researchAgent.description: Searches the web, analyzes data with Python, and generates comprehensive reports. Your research team, available 24/7.

roadmap.title: We're Just Getting Started
roadmap.subtitle: MyWorkMate is evolving fast. Here's what's live today and what's on the horizon.

multiAgent.title: Multi-Agent Orchestration
multiAgent.description: Supervisor routes to 5 specialized agents automatically

bcIntegration.title: Business Central Integration
bcIntegration.description: Full read & write access to Dynamics 365 Business Central

knowledgeBase.title: Knowledge Base (RAG)
knowledgeBase.description: Upload, search, and analyze documents with AI

dataViz.title: Data Visualization
dataViz.description: 10 chart types generated from structured data

cloudSync.title: OneDrive & SharePoint Sync
cloudSync.description: Connect cloud libraries for seamless document access

webResearch.title: Web Research & Code Execution
webResearch.description: Real-time web search and Python sandbox

mobileApp.title: Mobile Application
mobileApp.description: Full MyWorkMate experience on your phone

parallelAgents.title: Parallel Agent Execution
parallelAgents.description: Multiple agents working simultaneously on complex tasks

workflows.title: Automated Workflows
workflows.description: Create repeatable tasks triggered by events or commands

customAgents.title: Custom Agent Builder
customAgents.description: Create your own agents with custom skills and MCP tools

environments.title: Organization Environments
environments.description: Team management, billing controls, and usage tracking

deepResearch.title: Deep Research Mode
deepResearch.description: Autonomous multi-step research with source synthesis

waitlist.title: Be First to Experience the Future of Business AI
waitlist.subtitle: Join the waitlist for priority access. We'll notify you as new features launch and you'll get exclusive early-bird pricing.

success.title: You're on the list!
success.message: We'll reach out soon with updates and early access details.

error.title: Something went wrong
error.message: Please try again later. We're working on it.
error.unimplemented: Waitlist service is being set up. Check back soon!

benefits.feedback: Shape the product with your feedback

pricing.title: Plans That Scale With Your Business
pricing.subtitle: Start free. Upgrade when you need more power.

starter.name: Starter
starter.description: For regular users and small teams

professional.name: Professional
professional.description: For power users and growing businesses

trial.question: Is there a free trial for paid plans?
trial.answer: Yes, all paid plans include a 14-day free trial. No credit card required.

cancel.question: Can I cancel anytime?
cancel.answer: Absolutely. Cancel anytime with no fees. Your data remains accessible for 30 days after cancellation.

enterprise.question: Do you offer enterprise plans?
enterprise.answer: Yes. Contact us for custom pricing, dedicated support, and on-premise deployment options.

security.title: Built for Businesses That Take Security Seriously
security.subtitle: Your data stays yours. Every interaction is secured, every action is auditable, every access is controlled.

encryption.title: Encrypted at Rest & Transit
encryption.description: AES-256-GCM encryption for stored tokens. TLS for all communications.

tenantIsolation.title: Tenant Isolation
tenantIsolation.description: Strict data separation. Your documents, sessions, and AI interactions are invisible to other users.

permissions.title: Granular Permissions
permissions.description: Control what agents can do. Some actions always require your approval — you decide which.

gdpr.title: GDPR Compliant
gdpr.description: Full data portability and right to deletion. Cascade delete removes all PII on request.

audit.title: Full Audit Trail
audit.description: Every agent action, every tool call, every decision — logged and traceable.

oauth.title: Microsoft SSO
oauth.description: Sign in with your existing Microsoft account. No new passwords to manage.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.placeholder: Our privacy policy is being prepared. Check back soon.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.placeholder: Our terms of service are being prepared. Check back soon.

welcome.title: Welcome to MyWorkMate
welcome.content: Your AI-powered business assistant. Let us give you a quick tour of the key features.

filesTab.title: Your Knowledge Base
filesTab.content: Upload documents here to give MyWorkMate recurring context. These files will be available across all your conversations.

connectionsTab.title: Cloud Connections
connectionsTab.content: Connect your OneDrive or SharePoint accounts to automatically sync your business documents.

agentSelector.title: Specialized Agents
agentSelector.content: Each agent is an expert in a different area. Choose the one that best fits your question.

orchestratorDefault.title: Orchestrator — Recommended
orchestratorDefault.content: The Orchestrator automatically routes your questions to the best agent. We recommend keeping it as your default.

webSearchAttachments.title: Web Search & Attachments
webSearchAttachments.content: Enable web search with the Globe icon for up-to-date information, or attach temporary files with the Paperclip for single-session context.

done.title: You're All Set!
done.content: Start chatting to explore what MyWorkMate can do for your business. You can always revisit this tour from Settings.

fileExplorer.title: Your Synced Documents
fileExplorer.content: Connected documents appear here. Use the source filter to browse by OneDrive or SharePoint.

documentTypes.title: Organized by Type
documentTypes.content: Files are automatically categorized and processed so MyWorkMate can search and reference them in conversations.

newChat.title: Pro Tip: Keep Context Clean
newChat.content: Start a new chat for different topics — it helps MyWorkMate stay focused and accurate.

useAsContext.title: Pro Tip: Use Files as Context
useAsContext.content: Drag files from the panel into the chat, or right-click any file and select "Use as Context" to reference it.

atMention.title: Pro Tip: Quick File Reference
atMention.content: Type @ in the chat input to instantly search and reference your files.

toggleColumns.title: Pro Tip: Customize Your View
toggleColumns.content: Click here to show or hide table columns and tailor the file view to your needs.

tableResize.title: Pro Tip: Resize & Reorder Columns
tableResize.content: Drag column edges to resize, or drag column headers to reorder them.

refreshSync.title: Pro Tip: Refresh Sync
refreshSync.content: Hit refresh to check for pending sync updates and re-verify your cloud connections.

voiceInput.title: Pro Tip: Use Voice Input
voiceInput.content: Tap the microphone to dictate longer, more detailed messages — richer context means better results.
